_comment: Biome registry for procedural world generation. Each biome declares a climate-space envelope (per-axis [min, max] range) plus an optional base_tile key. The generator samples four climate axes (elevation, temperature, humidity, aether) per world hex and walks this list in declaration order — the first biome whose envelope contains all four samples wins. Order from specific to broad: high-elevation mountain catches first, plains last as the warm/mid fallback. Tile selection is a SEPARATE pass driven by per-tile climate envelopes (climate.* traits in cards/traits.json); biomes here are only used for (a) the revert-on-consume tile lookup via biome_for and (b) zone-level dominant-biome queries (future). See docs/BIOME_GENERATION.md.

_rules.climate_axes: elevation, temperature, humidity, aether — all in [0, 1]
_rules.ordering: first matching biome wins; put specific biomes before fallbacks
_rules.axis_omission: omitted axis ⇒ no constraint on that axis (treated as [0, 1])
_rules.base_tile: card key for the biome's 'barren base' tile — resolved through find_packed_by_key and returned by world_gen::biome_for for the consumed-tile revert path
